/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/core/path_guard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/core/job_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/core/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/core/hardware_probe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/core/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/api/routes_runs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/api/routes_modules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/api/routes_points.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/api/routes_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/api/routes_artifacts.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/legacy_variant_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/legacy_map_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/legacy_newton_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/legacy_transition_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/legacy_hidden_structure_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/legacy_3d_family_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/legacy_stl_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/cuda_probe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/adapters/openmp_probe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fractal_studio_backend.dir/src/report/conclusion_builder.cpp.o -o fractal_studio_backend  -lsqlite3 /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
